mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam (creater_id, exam_code, title, category, entree_code, question_count, examinee_count, created_at, started_at, finished_at, exam_time, activation_status) VALUES (#{createrId}, #{examCode}, #{title}, #{category}, #{entreeCode}, 0, 0, NOW(), #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{examTime}, COALESCE(#{activationStatus}, 'not_started'))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam WHERE title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
